sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ جَعْفَرٌ أَنْ يُرْسِلَ وَثِيقَةً مُهِمَّةً إِلَى الْمُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Džafer je zaboravio poslati važan dokument direktoru.
sentences.translationEn: Jaafar forgot to send an important document to the manager.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ ذَلِكَ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ قَبْلَ مُغَادَرَةِ الْمَكْتَبِ.
sentences.translation: Sjetio se toga na kraju dana prije napuštanja kancelarije.
sentences.translationEn: He remembered it at the end of the day before leaving the office.

sentences.translation: Odmah je poslao dokument i izvinio se direktoru.
sentences.translationEn: He sent the document immediately and apologised to the manager.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُدِيرُ لَا بَأْسَ وَشَكَرَهُ عَلَى الْإِرْسَالِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je rekao nema problema i zahvalio mu na slanju.
sentences.translationEn: The manager said no problem and thanked him for sending it.
